title: Microsoft Bicep Deployment
description: An Azure Resource Manager deployment created from a compiled Bicep template. Represents the deployment operation including the template, parameters, mode, and resulting provisioning state.

id.description: The fully qualified Azure resource ID of the deployment

location.description: The location to store the deployment data

DeploymentProperties.description: Deployment properties defining the template, parameters, and deployment behavior

template.description: The compiled Bicep/ARM template content provided inline

parameters.description: Name and value pairs defining deployment parameters

mode.description: The deployment mode. Incremental adds resources without deleting existing ones. Complete deletes resources not in the template.

provisioningState.description: The state of provisioning for the deployment

correlationId.description: The correlation ID of the deployment for tracking

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the template deployment

duration.description: The duration of the template deployment in ISO 8601 format

outputs.description: Key/value pairs that represent deployment output

templateHash.description: The hash produced for the compiled template

detailLevel.description: Specifies the type of information to log for debugging

scope.description: The scope for evaluating template expressions in nested templates

validationLevel.description: The level of validation performed on the deployment

TemplateLink.description: Reference to a template located at a URI or Template Spec

uri.description: The URI of the template to deploy

id.description: The resource ID of a Template Spec

contentVersion.description: Must match the ContentVersion in the template if included

queryString.description: Query string such as a SAS token to use with the templateLink URI

relativePath.description: Relative path for deploying linked templates relative to parent

ParametersLink.description: Reference to deployment parameters located at a URI

uri.description: The URI of the parameters file

contentVersion.description: Must match the ContentVersion in the template if included

DeploymentParameter.description: A single deployment parameter value, expression, or Key Vault reference

value.description: Direct input value to the parameter

DeploymentIdentity.description: The Managed Identity configuration for a deployment

clientId.description: The client ID of the assigned identity

principalId.description: The principal ID of the assigned identity

userAssignedIdentities.description: The set of user assigned identities

type.description: The deployment on error behavior type

deploymentName.description: The deployment to use on error when type is SpecificDeployment

id.description: The fully qualified Azure resource ID

apiVersion.description: The API version the resource was deployed with
